item.title: Extract init scaffold heredocs to template files
item.intent: Init templates live in .aishore/templates/ as real files, not heredocs embedded in bash. The aishore script loses ~160 lines and templates become editable without touching code.
item.description: Move all heredoc templates from _init_scaffold_files into .aishore/templates/: DEFINITIONS.md, PRODUCT.md.tmpl, ARCHITECTURE.md.tmpl, config.yaml.tmpl, backlog.json, bugs.json. Replace heredocs with cp or sed-based substitution (project_name, validate_cmd). Template files must be added to checksums.sha256 so they are included in updates.
steps: Extract DEFINITIONS.md heredoc (76 lines) to templates/DEFINITIONS.md
Extract config.yaml heredoc (29 lines) to templates/config.yaml.tmpl with $PROJECT_NAME and $VALIDATE_CMD placeholders
Extract PRODUCT.md heredoc (25 lines) to templates/PRODUCT.md.tmpl with $PROJECT_NAME placeholder
Extract ARCHITECTURE.md heredoc (21 lines) to templates/ARCHITECTURE.md.tmpl with $PROJECT_NAME placeholder
Extract backlog.json heredoc (7 lines) to templates/backlog.json
Extract bugs.json heredoc (6 lines) to templates/bugs.json
Replace heredocs in _init_scaffold_files with cp/sed commands
Add all template files to checksums.sha256
Run .aishore/aishore init -y in a temp dir to verify identical output
acceptanceCriteria: _init_scaffold_files uses cp/sed to install templates, contains zero heredocs
.aishore/aishore init -y produces identical directory structure and file contents as before
